title: cinnamomum lanaoense
intro: Cinnamomum lanaoense, also known as Lanao cinnamon, is a species of evergreen tree native to the Philippines, belonging to the Cinnamomum genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cinnamomum lanaoense include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to address various health concerns.
